name: Thai Chicken & Sesame Noodles
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Good Season Oriental Sesame Salad Dressing, prepared, divided
1 pound boneless skinless chicken breast halves, cut into strips
8 ounces thin spaghetti, cooked and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour 1/3 cup of the dressing over chicken in a medium bowl; toss to coat.
2. Cover. Refrigerate for 1 hour to marinate.
3. Mix remaining dressing, peanut butter, honey and pepper; set aside.
4. Cook chicken and marinade in a large skillet on medium-high heat until cooked through.
5. Mix spaghetti, chicken, carrot, onions and cilantro in a large bowl.
6. Add peanut butter mixture; toss to coat. Serve immediately.
Note from Pam: I break up the spaghetti into about 2-inch pieces before cooking--makes it easier to serve and eat!
